name: RFP Analyzer
description: Analyze an inbound RFP, extract requirements, score fit, and produce a structured response brief for the proposal team.
business_value: Replaces 2-4 hours of manual RFP triage per opportunity with a 90-second structured brief.

inputs.name: company_capabilities_url
inputs.description: Optional link to our internal capabilities deck — used to score fit.

outputs.name: summary
outputs.description: Executive brief: opportunity size, must-have requirements, must-not-haves, recommended bid/no-bid.

outputs.name: extracted_requirements
outputs.description: Structured list of requirements with priority and fit score.

outputs.name: next_recommended_tasks
outputs.description: Suggested next workflows (e.g. 'launch summarize_proposal on our draft response').
